name: get_chat_transcript
description: Fetch the full message transcript for a specific chat session. Returns all messages exchanged between visitor and agents.

parameters.name: property_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for your tawk.to property.

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the chat session.

messages.message: Hi, I need help with my order
Sure! Can you share your order number?
